step_rationale: Chemokine; M2 macrophage mediator; plaque inflammation and leukocyte recruitment.
mechanism: CCL22 chemokine recruits monocytes and regulates M2 macrophage polarization in atherosclerotic plaque inflammation.

references.title: Prior Exposure to Experimental Preeclampsia Increases Atherosclerotic Plaque Inflammation in Atherogenic Mice-Brief Report.
Identification of potential M2 macrophage-associated diagnostic biomarkers in coronary artery disease.
